sentence: O tempo não está bom hoje, deve chover à tarde.
ipa: ˈu ˈtẽpu ˈnɐ̃w̃ eˈsta ˈbõ ˈoʒi ˈdevi ʃoˈveɾ ˈa ˈtaɾdi
gloss_en: The weather isn't good today, it should rain in the afternoon.
notes: pt-BR koiné levelled toward the SE standard per noll2008; nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'não', nasal [õ] in 'bom' per silva2002; coda /s/ alveolar (no chiado) inherited from pt-BR per nascentes1953.

sentence: Esses sapatos custam noventa reais na loja do centro.
ipa: ˈeses saˈpatos ˈkustɐ̃ noˈvẽtɐ ʁeˈajs ˈnɐ ˈloʒɐ ˈdu ˈs̺ẽtɾu
gloss_en: These shoes cost ninety reais at the downtown store.
notes: Coda /s/ stays alveolar [s] with no chiado in 'esses'/'sapatos', per the SE-levelled koiné described in noll2008; onset /r/ [ʁ] in 'reais' per silva2002.

sentence: A reunião com a diretora é amanhã às três da tarde.
ipa: ˈɐ ʁewniˈɐ̃w̃ ˈkõ ˈɐ d͡ʒiɾeˈtoɾɐ ˈɛ amaˈɲɐ̃ ˈas ˈtɾes ˈdɐ ˈtaɾdi
gloss_en: The meeting with the director is tomorrow at three in the afternoon.
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'reunião', palatal [ɲ] in 'amanhã', open [ɛ] in 'é' and onset /r/ [ʁ] in 'reunião' per silva2002; SE-standard koiné per noll2008.

sentence: Meu irmão mora num apartamento perto do lago.
ipa: ˈmew iˈɾmɐ̃w̃ ˈmoɾɐ ˈnũ apaɾtaˈmẽtu ˈpeɾtu ˈdu ˈlaɡu
gloss_en: My brother lives in an apartment near the lake.
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'irmão' per silva2002; 'meu irmão' liaison and reduced pretonics per mateus_dandrade2000; koiné SE norm per noll2008.

sentence: Siga em frente e depois vire na segunda quadra.
ipa: ˈsiɡɐ ˈẽ ˈfɾẽti ˈi deˈpojs ˈviɾi ˈnɐ seˈɡũdɐ ˈkwadɾɐ
gloss_en: Go straight ahead and then turn on the second block.
notes: Nasal [ẽ] in 'em frente'; 'siga em' and 'frente e' liaisons per mateus_dandrade2000; planned-city lexicon 'quadra' per nascentes1953; imperative register per callou_leite2001.

sentence: A comida daquele restaurante estava muito gostosa.
ipa: ˈɐ koˈmidɐ daˈkeli ʁestaˈwɾɐ̃ti eˈstavɐ ˈmujtu ɡoˈstozɐ
gloss_en: The food at that restaurant was very tasty.
notes: Onset /r/ [ʁ] in 'restaurante' per silva2002; 'comida daquele' and unstressed reduction per mateus_dandrade2000; SE koiné per noll2008.

sentence: Onde é que fica a rodoviária do plano piloto?
ipa: ˈõdi ˈɛ ˈki ˈfikɐ ˈɐ ʁodoviˈaɾiɐ ˈdu ˈplanu piˈlotu
gloss_en: Where is the bus station of the Pilot Plan?
notes: Onset /r/ [ʁ] in 'rodoviária', open [ɛ] in 'é' per silva2002; Brasília-specific toponym 'plano piloto' per nascentes1953; 'onde é' and 'fica a' liaisons.

sentence: Quantas pessoas vêm para o jantar de domingo?
ipa: ˈkwɐ̃tas peˈsoas ˈvẽ ˈpaɾɐ ˈu ʒɐ̃ˈtaɾ ˈdi doˈmĩɡu
gloss_en: How many people are coming to Sunday dinner?
notes: Nasal [ɐ̃] in 'quantas'/'jantar' and [ẽ] in 'vêm' per silva2002; 'para o' liaison and coda /s/ alveolar per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Se eu pudesse, comprava um carro novo esse ano.
ipa: ˈsi ˈew puˈdesi kõˈpɾavɐ ˈũ ˈkaʁu ˈnovu ˈesi ˈanu
gloss_en: If I could, I'd buy a new car this year.
notes: Onset /r/ [ʁ] in 'carro' per silva2002; 'se eu' and 'novo esse' liaisons per mateus_dandrade2000; conditional-imperfect frame per callou_leite2001.

sentence: Ontem eu comprei frutas, verduras e um pouco de peixe.
ipa: ˈõtẽ ˈew kõˈpɾej ˈfɾutas veˈɾduɾas ˈi ˈũ ˈpowku ˈdi ˈpejʃi
gloss_en: Yesterday I bought fruit, vegetables and a bit of fish.
notes: 'ei' in 'comprei' and 'ou' in 'pouco' per silva2002; 'ontem eu' and 'verduras e' liaisons per mateus_dandrade2000; coda /s/ alveolar per noll2008.

sentence: Semana que vem a gente viaja para o litoral.
ipa: seˈmanɐ ˈki ˈvẽ ˈɐ ˈʒẽti viˈaʒɐ ˈpaɾɐ ˈu litoˈɾaw
gloss_en: Next week we're travelling to the coast.
notes: Coda /l/→[w] in 'litoral' per silva2002; nasal [ẽ] in 'vem'/'gente'; 'para o' liaison and 'a gente viaja' colloquial register per noll2008.

sentence: Me liga quando você chegar no trabalho de manhã.
ipa: ˈmi ˈliɡɐ ˈkwɐ̃du voˈs̺e ʃeˈɡaɾ ˈnu tɾaˈbaʎu ˈdi maˈɲɐ̃
gloss_en: Call me when you get to work in the morning.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'trabalho' and [ɲ] in 'manhã', onset /r/ tap coda in 'chegar' per silva2002; nasal [ɐ̃] in 'quando' per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: Bom dia, então, como é que você tem passado?
ipa: ˈbõ ˈd͡ʒiɐ ẽˈtɐ̃w̃ ˈkomu ˈɛ ˈki voˈs̺e ˈtẽ paˈsadu
gloss_en: Good morning, so how have you been?
notes: Nasal [õ] in 'bom', diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'então', open [ɛ] in 'é' per silva2002; greeting register and SE koiné per noll2008.

sentence: Quem não arrisca não petisca, dizia a minha avó.
ipa: ˈkẽ ˈnɐ̃w̃ aˈʁiskɐ ˈnɐ̃w̃ peˈt͡ʃiskɐ d͡ʒiˈziɐ ˈɐ ˈmiɲɐ aˈvɔ
gloss_en: Nothing ventured, nothing gained, my grandmother used to say.
notes: Nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'não', palatal [ɲ] in 'minha', open [ɔ] in 'avó', onset /r/ [ʁ] in 'arrisca' per silva2002; proverb register per callou_leite2001.

sentence: O carro do senhor corre demais na avenida larga.
ipa: ˈu ˈkaʁu ˈdu seˈɲoɾ ˈkoʁi deˈmajs ˈnɐ aveˈnidɐ ˈlaɾɡɐ
gloss_en: The gentleman's car speeds too much on the wide avenue.
notes: Onset /r/ [ʁ] in 'carro'/'corre' and palatal [ɲ] in 'senhor' per silva2002; planned-city 'avenida larga' lexicon per nascentes1953.

sentence: Aquela mulher trabalha numa escola perto da igreja.
ipa: aˈkelɐ muˈʎeɾ tɾaˈbaʎɐ ˈnumɐ eˈskolɐ ˈpeɾtu ˈdɐ iˈɡɾeʒɐ
gloss_en: That woman works at a school near the church.
notes: Palatal [ʎ] in 'mulher'/'trabalha' per silva2002; 'escola perto' unstressed reduction and coda /s/ alveolar per mateus_dandrade2000; SE koiné per noll2008.

sentence: Comprei couve, feijão e farinha na feira de sábado.
ipa: kõˈpɾej ˈkowvi feˈjʒɐ̃w̃ ˈi faˈɾiɲɐ ˈnɐ ˈfejɾɐ ˈdi ˈsabadu
gloss_en: I bought kale, beans and flour at Saturday's market.
notes: 'ei'/'ou' in 'comprei'/'couve'/'feira', nasal diphthong [ɐ̃w̃] in 'feijão', palatal [ɲ] in 'farinha' per silva2002; 'feijão e' liaison per mateus_dandrade2000.

sentence: O café daquele hotel antigo era bem forte.
ipa: ˈu kaˈfɛ daˈkeli oˈtew ɐ̃ˈt͡ʃiɡu ˈeɾɐ ˈbẽ ˈfoɾti
gloss_en: The coffee at that old hotel was quite strong.
notes: Open [ɛ] in 'café', coda /l/→[w] in 'hotel', nasal [ẽ] in 'bem' per silva2002; /t/ palatalisation [t͡ʃ] in 'antigo' per noll2008; 'café daquele' reduction.

sentence: O sol forte brilha por cima das colinas verdes.
ipa: ˈu ˈsow ˈfoɾti ˈbɾiʎɐ ˈpoɾ ˈs̺imɐ ˈdas koˈlinas ˈveɾdes
gloss_en: The strong sun shines over the green hills.
notes: Coda /l/→[w] in 'sol' and palatal [ʎ] in 'brilha' per silva2002; coda /s/ alveolar in 'das'/'colinas' (no chiado) per noll2008; coda /r/ tap in 'forte'/'por'.

sentence: A filha dela guarda o dinheiro num cofre velho.
ipa: ˈɐ ˈfiʎɐ ˈdelɐ ˈɡwaɾdɐ ˈu d͡ʒiˈɲejɾu ˈnũ ˈkofɾi ˈveʎu
gloss_en: Her daughter keeps the money in an old safe.
notes: Palatals [ʎ] in 'filha'/'velho' and [ɲ] in 'dinheiro' per silva2002; 'ei' in 'dinheiro'; 'guarda o' liaison per mateus_dandrade2000.
